title: GuidelineRagEvaluationDataset
description: Schema for evaluation items used to test retrieval, answer quality, guardrails, and A/B variants in the German oncology guideline RAG app.

dataset_split.description: Logical dataset split used for scoring or test execution.

expected_behavior.description: Expected high-level system behavior for this item, especially useful for guardrail and smoke-test cases.

question.description: User question or prompt in German.

question_type.description: Primary question category aligned with routing and tool behavior.

difficulty.description: Estimated difficulty of the evaluation item.

source_chunk_ids.description: Seed source chunks from which the question was derived.

expected_answer.description: Reference answer used for correctness and answer-quality evaluation.

expected_answer_plain_language.description: Optional reference answer for the plain-language response layer.

gold_chunk_ids.description: Gold retrieval chunk identifiers considered relevant for the question.

gold_sections.description: Relevant section paths or recommendation labels expected in support of the answer.

gold_pages.description: Relevant page numbers expected in retrieval results or citations.

expected_filters.description: Optional metadata filters expected to be relevant to the query.

requires_comparison.description: Whether the system should compare multiple guidelines or sources.

needs_pubmed.description: Whether the question is expected to trigger external PubMed usage.

should_refuse.description: Whether the system should refuse or redirect the request.

should_redact_pii.description: Whether the input contains PII that should be redacted during processing.

expected_tools.description: Optional list of expected tools or tool families likely to be used.

notes.description: Optional human curation notes about the item.
